name: integration-test-app
description: Build a comprehensive integration test application that exercises ywai's CLI, install workflow, agent detection, kanban, and missions subsystems end-to-end as a standalone binary

milestones.name: test-runner
milestones.description: Integration test application binary with CLI entry point, configurable test runner, pass/fail reporting, and build integration into dev.sh

milestones.name: cli-tests
milestones.description: Integration tests for all CLI commands: version, help, install, update, skills, agents, doctor — verifying correct exit codes, output format, and error messages

milestones.name: install-tests
milestones.description: Integration tests for install/update/skill-registry workflows covering dry-run, presets (full-gentleman, ecosystem-only, minimal), agent targeting, and scope (global, workspace)

milestones.name: agent-tests
milestones.description: Integration tests for agent detection across all 15 supported agents, verifying binary path discovery, agent ID matching, and configuration loading

milestones.name: kanban-tests
milestones.description: Integration tests for the kanban subsystem: session lifecycle, delegation creation, board operations, activities, dependency graph, and pending decisions resolution

milestones.name: missions-tests
milestones.description: Integration tests for the missions subsystem: planning lifecycle (explore → propose → spec → design → tasks → apply → verify → archive), store persistence, recovery, and validation

features.description: Create integration test app binary at cmd/integration-test/ with CLI entry point accepting --suite, --filter, --verbose flags
expectedBehavior: Integration test binary builds with `go build ./cmd/integration-test`
Binary accepts --help flag and prints usage
Binary accepts --suite flag to select test suites
Binary accepts --filter flag to run specific tests by name
Binary exits 0 on all tests pass, non-zero on failures

features.description: Implement test runner with suite registration, individual test registration, pass/fail counters, and TAP or JUnit-compatible output
expectedBehavior: Test suites can be registered with a name and teardown
Individual tests can be registered with a name and function
Runner returns test count, passed count, failed count
Runner supports JUnit XML output for CI integration
Runner supports verbose mode showing each test name as it executes

features.description: Add reusable test helpers: buildYwaiBinary, runYwai, withTempDir, withFakeAgent, withFakeGentleAI — ported and expanded from e2e/helper_test.go
expectedBehavior: buildYwaiBinary compiles ywai and returns path to binary
runYwai executes command and returns stdout, stderr, exit code
withTempDir creates and cleans up temp directory
withFakeAgent creates mock agent binary in PATH
withFakeGentleAI creates mock gentle-ai binary and config

features.description: Add dev.sh integration-test subcommand that builds and runs the integration test app, wiring into the existing dev workflow
expectedBehavior: `bash scripts/dev.sh integration-test` builds and runs all integration tests
Non-zero exit when any test fails
Output includes suite name, test count, and pass/fail summary

features.description: Implement CLI version command integration test verifying --version flag output and formatting
expectedBehavior: Test builds ywai binary and runs `ywai --version`
Output contains version string (semver format)
Output does not contain error messages
Command exits with code 0

features.description: Implement CLI help command integration test verifying --help flag output across all subcommands
expectedBehavior: Test builds ywai binary and runs `ywai --help`
Output lists all available commands (install, update, skills, agents, doctor, skill-registry)
Output contains usage information
Command exits with code 0

features.description: Implement CLI install command smoke test verifying --dry-run flag works without gentle-ai installed
expectedBehavior: Test withFakeAgent and runs `ywai install --dry-run`
Output indicates dry-run mode
Command exits with code 0
No actual files are modified

features.description: Implement CLI doctor and skills commands integration test verifying output structure
expectedBehavior: Test runs `ywai doctor --dry-run` and verifies health check output
Test runs `ywai skills` and verifies skill listing format
Skills output includes 'Total:' count
Commands exit with code 0

features.description: Implement integration test for unknown/malformed CLI commands verifying error handling
expectedBehavior: Running `ywai unknown-command` exits with non-zero code
Output contains error message indicating unknown command
Running `ywai --invalid-flag` exits with non-zero code

features.description: Implement install dry-run integration test for all preset options (full-gentleman, ecosystem-only, minimal, custom)
expectedBehavior: Test `ywai install --dry-run --preset full-gentleman` outputs expected install steps
Test `ywai install --dry-run --preset ecosystem-only` outputs expected install steps
Test `ywai install --dry-run --preset minimal` outputs expected install steps
No actual writes occur for any preset in dry-run mode

features.description: Implement install integration test with --agent flag targeting supported agents
expectedBehavior: Test `ywai install --dry-run --agent opencode` includes opencode-specific setup
Test `ywai install --dry-run --agent claude-code` includes claude-code-specific setup
Test uses withFakeAgent to simulate agent presence
Output references the specified agent

features.description: Implement install integration test for scope handling (global vs workspace) and SDD mode flags
expectedBehavior: Test `ywai install --dry-run --scope global` uses global paths
Test `ywai install --dry-run --scope workspace` uses local project paths
Test `ywai install --dry-run --sdd-mode single` includes single-mode setup
Test `ywai install --dry-run --sdd-mode multi` includes multi-mode setup

features.description: Implement update integration test verifying update --dry-run output with sync, permission, and theme flags
expectedBehavior: Test `ywai update --dry-run` outputs expected update steps
Test `ywai update --dry-run --strict-tdd` includes TDD mode configuration
Test `ywai update --dry-run --include-permissions` references permissions sync

features.description: Implement skill-registry integration test verifying refresh with --cwd flag
expectedBehavior: Test `ywai skill-registry --dry-run --cwd /tmp` runs without error
Test `ywai skill-registry --cwd /tmp` exits with code 0 (with fake gentle-ai)

features.description: Implement integration test for detecting all 15 supported agent binaries
expectedBehavior: withFakeAgent creates mock agent binaries with specific names
`ywai agents` lists detected agents
Detected agent IDs match the created mock binaries
Non-existent agent binaries are not listed

features.description: Implement integration test for agent detection edge cases: multiple agents, config-dir agents, and graceful handling of missing agents
expectedBehavior: Multiple concurrent agent binaries are all detected
Config-dir-based agents (antigravity, trae-ide, windsurf) are detected via config paths
Running `ywai agents` with no agents outputs appropriate message
Invalid/non-existent agent binary in PATH is handled without crash

features.description: Implement kanban session lifecycle integration test: create, list, delete sessions across multiple test projects
expectedBehavior: Creating a kanban session returns a valid session ID
Listing sessions returns the created session
Sessions are grouped by project
Deleting a session removes it from listings
Deleting a session also removes all its delegations

features.description: Implement kanban delegation lifecycle integration test: create, update column/status, and remove delegations
expectedBehavior: Creating a delegation under a session links it to the session
Updating delegation column moves card visually
Updating delegation status transitions through pending/running/review/done
Board view shows delegations in correct columns

features.description: Implement kanban dependency graph integration test: add dependencies between delegations and verify graph output
expectedBehavior: Dependencies between delegations are stored and retrievable
Dependency graph returns nodes and edges
Blocked delegations are reflected in the graph structure

features.description: Implement kanban activities and pending decisions integration test: add/resolve activities, decisions, blockers
expectedBehavior: Adding a progress activity returns a valid activity ID
Adding a decision activity appears in pending decisions
Adding a blocker activity appears in pending decisions
Resolving a decision removes it from pending decisions
Activity timeline for a delegation shows all activities in order

features.description: Implement missions planning lifecycle integration test: full explore → propose → spec → design → tasks → apply → verify → archive sequence
expectedBehavior: Exploring a plan idea creates exploration artifacts with questions and answers
Proposing creates a structured change proposal with intent and scope
Specifying creates delta specs with requirements and scenarios
Designing creates technical design with architecture approach
Task planning breaks down into implementation tasks with preconditions
Applying creates feature files matching the task descriptions
Verifying executes tests and reports pass/fail against specs
Archiving syncs delta specs to mark completion

features.description: Implement missions store persistence integration test: create, list, get, and recover mission plans across sessions
expectedBehavior: Creating a plan persists it to disk in the store directory
Listing plans returns all stored plans
Getting a plan by name returns the correct plan
After simulated crash/restart, plans are recoverable from disk
Corrupted plan files are handled without crashing the store

features.description: Implement missions validation integration test: plan validation rules, missing fields, and constraint checking
expectedBehavior: A plan with missing required fields fails validation with descriptive errors
A plan with circular dependency references fails validation
A plan with duplicate feature IDs fails validation
A valid plan passes all validation checks without errors

features.description: Implement cross-cutting integration test: full agent detection → mission creation → kanban delegation pipeline
expectedBehavior: Detected agents can be assigned as mission plan participants
Mission tasks can be delegated to kanban as tracked work items
Kanban delegation status reflects mission task completion state
End-to-end flow completes without errors across subsystem boundaries

features.description: Implement recovery and error handling integration test: corrupted data, missing dependencies, permission errors
expectedBehavior: Missing kanban data directory auto-creates on first operation
Recovery from partially written mission plan succeeds
Permission-denied errors on store directory produce meaningful error messages
Timeout handling for long-running operations with configurable duration
